exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: He might have known about this.
She might have already known.
She might have heard this.
He might have hidden something.

exercises.hindiScript: शायद वह देर से सोई होगी।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: She might not have seen this.
We might have made a mistake.
They might have agreed with me.
She might have slept late.

exercises.hindiScript: शायद उन्होंने मेरी मदद की होगी।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: We might have gone the wrong way.
They might not have said anything.
He might have reached there.
They might have helped me.

exercises.audioScript: He might have broken the promise.
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: He might have hidden something.
He might have arrived by now.
She might have forgotten me.
He might have broken the promise.
exercises.answer: He might have broken the promise.

exercises.hindiScript: शायद वह पहले जान चुकी होगी।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: She might have slept late.
She might have been upset with me.
We might have thought wrong.
She might have already known.

exercises.audioScript: We might have made a mistake.
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: They might have helped me.
We might have done this better.
They might have changed this plan.
We might have made a mistake.
exercises.answer: We might have made a mistake.

exercises.audioScript: They might not have said anything.
exercises.hindiScript: शायद उन्होंने कुछ नहीं कहा होगा।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: He might have broken the promise.
He might have gone, but I am not sure.
He might have known about this.
They might not have said anything.
exercises.answer: They might not have said anything.

exercises.audioScript: He might have arrived by now.
exercises.hindiScript: शायद वह अब तक पहुँच गया होगा।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: She might have already known.
She might have heard this.
She might not have seen this.
He might have arrived by now.
exercises.answer: He might have arrived by now.

dictationPassage.text: He might have hidden something. She might have slept late. They might have helped me. He might have broken the promise. She might have already known.
dictationPassage.hindiTranslation: शायद उसने कुछ छिपाया होगा। शायद वह देर से सोई होगी। शायद उन्होंने मेरी मदद की होगी। शायद उसने वादा तोड़ा होगा। शायद वह पहले जान चुकी होगी।
